states.label: Idle
evidence: <button id="new-ms">New</button>
<button id="clone-ms">Clone</button>
<button id="rename-ms">Rename</button>
<button id="delete-ms">Delete</button>

states.label: Multiset Created
evidence: snapshot("Created multiset " + nm);

states.label: Element Added
evidence: snapshot("Set " + elem + " -> " + count + " in " + msName);

states.label: Element Modified
evidence: snapshot((delta>=0?"+":"") + delta + " " + elem + " in " + msName);

states.label: Bulk Applied
evidence: snapshot("Added bulk to " + msName);

states.label: Operation Performed
evidence: logOp("preview " + opType);

states.label: History Updated
evidence: snapshot("Undo to " + state.historyIndex);
el('new-ms').addEventListener('click', ()=> { const name = prompt('New multiset name (leave empty for default):'); newMultiset(name || undefined); });

el('clone-ms').addEventListener('click', ()=> { const active = state.active; if (!active) return alert('No active'); const newName = makeUniqueName(active + '_copy'); state.multisets[newName] = cloneDeep(state.multisets[active]); state.namesOrder.push(newName); snapshot('Cloned ' + active + ' to ' + newName); refreshAll(); });

el('rename-ms').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const active = state.active; if (!active) return alert('No active'); const nn = prompt('Rename ' + active + ' to:', active); if (!nn) return; if (state.multisets[nn]) return alert('Name exists'); state.multisets[nn] = state.multisets[active]; state.namesOrder = state.namesOrder.map(n=> n===active? nn: n); delete state.multisets[active]; if (state.active === active) state.active = nn; snapshot('Renamed ' + active + ' -> ' + nn); refreshAll(); });

el('delete-ms').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const active = state.active; if (!active) return alert('No active'); if (!confirm('Delete ' + active + '?')) return; delete state.multisets[active]; state.namesOrder = state.namesOrder.filter(n=> n!==active); state.active = state.namesOrder[0] || null; snapshot('Deleted ' + active); refreshAll(); });

events.description: Add or set an element in the active multiset
evidence: el('add-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return alert('No active'); const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); const count = Math.floor(Number(el('multiplicity-input').value) || 0); if (count <= 0) return alert('multiplicity must be >0'); addBulk(name, {[elem]: count}, false); });

events.description: Increment the multiplicity of an element
evidence: el('inc-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return; const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); incMultiplicity(name, elem, 1); });

events.description: Decrement the multiplicity of an element
evidence: el('dec-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return; const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); incMultiplicity(name, elem, -1); });

events.description: Remove an element from the active multiset
evidence: el('remove-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return; const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); setMultiplicity(name, elem, 0); });

events.description: Apply bulk additions to the active multiset
evidence: el('apply-bulk').addEventListener('click', ()=> { const txt = el('bulk-input').value; if (!txt.trim()) return alert('No bulk text'); const entries = parseBulkText(txt); addBulk(state.active, entries, false); });
el('clear-bulk').addEventListener('click', ()=> el('bulk-input').value = '');
el('op-union').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('union'); logOp('preview union'); });
el('op-sum').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('sum'); logOp('preview sum'); });
el('op-intersection').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('intersection'); logOp('preview intersection'); });
el('op-diff').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('difference'); logOp('preview difference'); });
el('op-symdiff').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('symdiff'); logOp('preview symdiff'); });

el('undo').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if (state.historyIndex <= 0) return alert('No more undo'); state.historyIndex--; const dp = cloneDeep(state.history[state.historyIndex].data); state.multisets = cloneDeep(dp.multisets); state.namesOrder = cloneDeep(dp.namesOrder); state.active = dp.active; refreshAll(); updateHistoryUI(); logOp('Undo to ' + state.historyIndex); });

el('redo').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if (state.historyIndex >= state.history.length -1) return alert('No more redo'); state.historyIndex++; const dp = cloneDeep(state.history[state.historyIndex].data); state.multisets = cloneDeep(dp.multisets); state.namesOrder = cloneDeep(dp.namesOrder); state.active = dp.active; refreshAll(); updateHistoryUI(); logOp('Redo to ' + state.historyIndex); });
el('new-ms').addEventListener('click', ()=> { const name = prompt('New multiset name (leave empty for default):'); newMultiset(name || undefined); });

el('inc-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return; const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); incMultiplicity(name, elem, 1); });

el('dec-element').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const name = state.active; if (!name) return; const elem = el('element-input').value.trim(); if (!elem) return alert('No element'); incMultiplicity(name, elem, -1); });

el('apply-bulk').addEventListener('click', ()=> { const txt = el('bulk-input').value; if (!txt.trim()) return alert('No bulk text'); const entries = parseBulkText(txt); addBulk(state.active, entries, false); });
el('op-union').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const res = runBinaryOp('union'); logOp('preview union'); });
